spec_match.rationale: Walks through the exact standard four-step SAA integration path (probe, request, write, verify) that replaces RWS auto-grants.

interactive.rationale: Features a brilliant, multi-stage step wizard containing 4 distinct manual button controls that trigger real browser actions and print precise status markers.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches parent index perfectly: walks through hasStorageAccess(), requestStorageAccess(), setting a cookie, and checking states.

edge_cases.rationale: Each step is safely isolated in try-catch boundaries, gracefully reporting detailed SecurityErrors (such as rejections caused by missing user gestures or top-level contexts).

references.rationale: Directly maps back to target ChromeStatus entry, MDN Storage Access API guide, and companion index pages.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful clean spacing, custom card columns, displayed step indices, and breadcrumbs conforming perfectly.

summary: An exceptional, highly interactive concept page detailing the canonical transition from passive RWS sets to active user-mediated Storage Access API requests. Fully protected by try-catch boundaries and perfectly aligned with style guides, this serves as a model showcase demo.
